title: acalypha infesta
intro: Acalypha infesta is a type of plant species in the Euphorbiaceae family, commonly known as the 'Thorny Caterpillar Plant' or 'Cat's Paw'. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which have been found to aid in wound healing and reduce fever. The health benefits of Acalypha infesta include its ability to treat various ailments such as skin conditions, respiratory issues, and digestive problems. The plant is often prepared as a decoction or infusion, and can also be used as a paste or powder in various herbal preparations.
